sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9068" key="a)nisoplhqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνῐσο-πληθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n9068.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unequal in number,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ. γωνίας ἔχειν,</foreign> of polygons, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:308:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Papp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">308.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
